contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Outreach pipeline: auto-reply filtering, farm taste profiles, follow-up reply detection
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/111
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/94
  
  Details:
  Analyzed the DApp Remarks sheet, Email Agent Follow Up, and Email Agent Drafts to identify gaps in the AI outreach pipeline. Implemented four fixes:
  
  1. Auto-reply filtering — Added is_auto_reply() to detect out-of-office/auto-responder messages so they don't get promoted to AI: Prospect replied
  2. Farm taste profiles in drafts — Created farm_taste_profiles.md (Oscar's/Paulo's/Vivi's with taste descriptors) and field_insights_outreach.md (field-tested conversion patterns), wired into Grok warm-up system prompt
  3. Updated fallback warm-up template to name specific farms with taste descriptors instead of generic 'ceremonial cacao'
  4. Follow-up reply detection — Added --reply-promotion-only mode to suggest_manager_followup_drafts.py and wired into hourly email-agent-sync-followup.yml workflow
  
  Session: ~1 hour. PRs: go_to_market#111, agentic_ai_context#94
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
